channel.title: Self-Host Guide
channel.description: Practical tutorials for building and managing your own homelab.

item.title: How to Set Up a Personal Wiki with BookStack
item.description: Step-by-step guide to self-hosting BookStack: Docker deployment, Nginx reverse proxy, LDAP integration, backup automation.

item.title: Introduction to Ansible for Homelab Automation
item.description: Learn Ansible for homelab automation: inventory, playbooks, roles, and server hardening automation.

item.title: Docker Networking Explained for Beginners
item.description: Bridge, host, overlay networks, Docker Compose networking, and troubleshooting explained.

item.title: Self-Hosted Password Manager with Vaultwarden
item.description: Docker deployment, reverse proxy, backups, and client setup for Vaultwarden.

item.title: Securing Your Self-Hosted Server: A Practical Guide
item.description: SSH hardening, firewall, fail2ban, Docker security, and auditing for self-hosted servers.

item.title: Automatic Backup Strategies for Self-Hosted Services
item.description: 3-2-1 backup rule, database backups, off-site sync, and recovery testing for self-hosted services.

item.title: Monitoring Your Homelab with Prometheus and Grafana
item.description: Complete monitoring stack with Docker Compose, dashboards, and alerting rules.

item.title: How to Set Up Your Own VPN with WireGuard
item.description: Server and client configuration, performance optimization, and Docker deployment for WireGuard VPN.

item.title: Nginx Reverse Proxy Setup Guide for Self-Hosted Apps
item.description: Multi-site configuration, SSL with Certbot, WebSocket proxy, and performance tuning.

item.title: Cloudflare Tunnel: Free & Secure Way to Expose Services
item.description: Expose self-hosted apps without opening ports, with Docker integration and security best practices.

item.title: Docker Compose for Self-Hosting: Beginner's Guide
item.description: Docker Compose basics, essential commands, and real Flask+PostgreSQL deployment example.

item.title: WSL2 Ultimate Productivity Environment Setup
item.description: Proxy configuration, disk compaction, systemd services, and dev toolchain for WSL2.

item.title: Hermes Agent Complete Setup Guide (2026)
item.description: WebUI configuration, QQ Bot integration, systemd auto-start for your private AI assistant.

item.title: Linux Server Disk Cleanup Practical Guide
item.description: Log rotation, Docker image cleanup, and locating large files on Linux servers.

item.title: FastAPI Project: From Development to Deployment
item.description: Project structure, API design, Nginx reverse proxy, and Docker packaging for FastAPI.
